rulings.Case Title: ROLAND STONE VS. JOHN C MITCHELL et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 8, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT JOHN MITCHELL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED REGARDING DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE THAT THE PROPERTY ONLY HAD NINE LEGAL UNITS. DEFENDANT TESTIFIED AT PAGE 29 OF HIS DEPOSITION THAT HE KNEW 2 UNITS SHARED ONE PG&E METER AND THAT HE PAID THAT BILL. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN GATE REPORTING A CORPORATION VS. WAUKEEN Q MCCOY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Further Responses To Req.'S For Admissions, Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories And Req. For Production, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday, September 8, 2010, Line 2. PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE REPORTING A CORPORATION's Motion for order Compelling Further Responses To Requests For Admissions, Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories And Req. For Production, And For Monetary Sanctions. Granted in part. Motion to compel granted. Defendant to provide verified further responses within 30 days to plaintiff's request for admissions, set no.1, plaintiff's form interrogatories, set no.1, and plaintiff's demand for identification and production of documents for inspection and copying, set no.1. Request for sanctions denied. = (302/CWW)
